Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and the next occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time it takes to perform SW-AE Assign Reviewers after SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-AE Assign Reviewers following SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Reviewer Declined measured as the duration until a new reviewer is successfully assigned (i.e., until SW-Reviewer Agreed)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Declined and SW-Reviewer Unavailable when both occur in the same variant
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late in variants where delays occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Reviewer Declined in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-AE Assign Reviewers to be executed after SW-Reviewer Declined in high-performance variants (performance < median)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to the next SW-Reviewer Declined in repeated-decline scenarios
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time until SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs after the first SW-Reviewer Declined in multi-round reviewer assignment variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to Assign a Different Editor in variants involving editor reassignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'
